compiled_state.title: Implement check-plugin-boundary.sh + allowlist + pre-commit registration
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
Story: c73a-1918
testing_mode: GREEN
Layer: 1 (implementation)
Depends on: 03d3-02af (T1 RED test)

Make the T1 test GREEN.

Files to create/modify:
1. plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-boundary.sh (create, chmod +x)
2. plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit/plugin-boundary-allowlist.conf (create)
3. .pre-commit-config.yaml (modify — add hook entry)

Implementation spec:

check-plugin-boundary.sh:
- set -uo pipefail
- Discover staged additions: git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=A
- Filter to files under plugins/dso/ only
- If no additions to plugins/dso/: exit 0 immediately
- Resolve ALLOWLIST_FILE: same dir as script (plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit/plugin-boundary-allowlist.conf)
- FAIL-OPEN: if allowlist file missing/unreadable → print warning to stderr, exit 0
- For each filtered path:
  - Strip "plugins/dso/" prefix → relative_path
  - Read allowlist patterns line by line (skip blank lines and lines starting with #)
  - Use bash `case` statement to match relative_path against each pattern
  - If no pattern matches → print error to stderr including the allowlist file path, accumulate violation
- After all files checked: if any violation → exit 1, else exit 0

plugin-boundary-allowlist.conf:
- Comment block at top explaining: "Add new patterns here when adding a new permitted path to plugins/dso/"
- Cover all currently-permitted plugin paths (post-S1 state — run check to confirm zero violations)
- Use glob wildcards (e.g., skills/**/*.md, hooks/**/*.sh) not exact paths
- Cover at minimum: skills/, hooks/, agents/, scripts/, docs/ (plugin-level docs only), INSTALL.md, etc.

.pre-commit-config.yaml registration:
- Add entry consistent with existing hooks (portability-check, shim-refs-check)
- id: plugin-boundary-check
- name: Plugin Boundary Check (5s timeout)
- entry: ./plugins/dso/scripts/pre-commit-wrapper.sh plugin-boundary-check 5 "plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-boundary.sh"
- language: system
- pass_filenames: false
- stages: [pre-commit]
- files: ^plugins/dso/

.test-index update:
- Add entry: plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-boundary.sh:tests/hooks/test-check-plugin-boundary.sh

Verification:
- bash tests/hooks/test-check-plugin-boundary.sh → all pass
- Running hook against current plugins/dso/ staged state → 0 violations
